name: Operation.ShapeMetadataResult
summary: The result type of the shape metadata operations. If you alter this, check if you need to change ShapeMetadataResult_e on the Tekla Structures core side

enum_values.name: DuplicateKeyExist
enum_values.summary: At least one identical pre-existing key was found in the shape when trying to insert key and value

enum_values.name: NoMatchingShape
enum_values.summary: No matching shape found for the GUID in the catalog

enum_values.name: NoMatchingKey
enum_values.summary: No matching key found for the GUID in the shape
